records.ety: [L. peritoneum, peritonaeum, Gr. <?/, <?/, fr. <?/ to stretch all around or over; peri` around + <?/ to stretch.]

defs: The smooth serous membrane which lines the cavity of the abdomen, or the whole body cavity when there is no diaphragm, and, turning back, surrounds the viscera, forming a closed, or nearly closed, sac.
